title: Lost Libraries
description: Ancient libraries lay buried, forgotten by time. Magic books are abundant.
body:
![Lost Library](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o4gsLB4v/images/84fc8b60f9975e30e23d383e74551f394dd2b738.webp)

<center>

[![joshie-app](https://joshie.app/files/joshie_app_download.svg)](https://joshie.app/mods/lost-libraries)

[![discord-plural](https://joshie.app/files/discord_join.svg)](https://discord.gg/HUMbRQhxdR)         [![paypal-plural](https://joshie.app/files/payppal_me.svg)](https://paypal.me/joshieman)         [![youtube-plural](https://joshie.app/files/youtube_banner.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/@joshieman)

</center>

## Features

**New Structure:** The lost library generates underground. It has a lot of bookshelves, maybe some are salvageable? Also has anvils, a lodestone, a smithing table, and a potion station.

## Compatibility

Spawns using the `#is_overworld` tag, so should be compatible with anything. Uses stronghold library loot, so changing that will change the loot that appears in this structure.

**REQUIRES COMMAND BLOCKS**
